seasonality: Revenue is event-driven, spiking during high-volatility periods (liquidation fees surge) and bull-market borrowing demand, with Q1 2025 showing notably elevated activity versus prior quarters.
rationale: DefiLlama reports Aave TVL near $22.8B as of late May 2025, making it the largest lending protocol by TVL. Annualized protocol revenue (fees accruing to the DAO treasury and stakers) is approximately $182M based on trailing 30-day DefiLlama fee data (~$15M/month) annualized; at an AAVE market cap of roughly $2.76B this implies a P/S of ~15x and P/TVL of ~0.12x. Real yield to stkAAVE holders is estimated at 3.8% APR based on Aave governance forum Q1 2025 revenue reports, with no material token inflation directed to stakers (stkAAVE emissions are minimal post-Aave v3 migration, hence inflationary yield set to null).
